Package neqsim.process.util.optimizer

Class InstalledCapacityTableLoader.InstalledCapacityRecord

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.optimizer.InstalledCapacityTableLoader.InstalledCapacityRecord
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
InstalledCapacityTableLoader
public static class InstalledCapacityTableLoader.InstalledCapacityRecord extends Object implements Serializable
Installed capacity record loaded from the table.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Constructor Details

    • InstalledCapacityRecord

      public InstalledCapacityRecord(String area, String equipment, String constraint, String currentValueAddress, double designValue, double maxValue, String unit, CapacityConstraint.ConstraintSeverity severity, boolean enabled)
      Creates an installed capacity record.
      Parameters:
      area - process area name
      equipment - equipment name
      constraint - constraint name
      currentValueAddress - automation address for current value
      designValue - design value
      maxValue - maximum value
      unit - unit
      severity - severity
      enabled - true when enabled
